description: Evaluates application development and testing maturity—service governance, KPIs/KRIs, secure development strategy, ownership and separation of duties, DevSecOps CI/CD, application testing, proactive issue identification, static and dynamic testing, developer access management, business analysts, DevSecOps architecture, and expert code review.

capabilities.name: Service exists and is in good condition
capabilities.description: An application development management service exists, is scoped appropriately, and is reviewed for efficacy.
evaluation_focus: Enterprise application development management service exists
Frequent application development management service efficacy review

capabilities.name: KPIs/KRIs
capabilities.description: Application development KPIs and KRIs are formalized, documented, and reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs for application development
Frequent KPI/KRI review

capabilities.name: Secure Application development
capabilities.description: A documented application development strategy incorporates security early, includes automation of code and secure provisioning, and is reviewed frequently.
evaluation_focus: Application development strategy exists
Security incorporated at early development stages
Automation of code and secure provisioning
Frequent review of application development policies and strategies

capabilities.name: Application development owners
capabilities.description: Clear business owners exist for applications with separation of duties, and developers and testers have access only to staging environments—not production.
evaluation_focus: Clear business owners and separation of duties policies
Developers and testers limited to staging environments

capabilities.name: DevSecOps CI/CD software
capabilities.description: DevSecOps software automates development milestones, supports CI/CD for all applications, is reviewed frequently, and integrates with workload management, monitoring, compliance, and vulnerability systems.
evaluation_focus: DevSecOps software adoption
Automation support for application development milestones
CI/CD pipeline utilized for all applications
Frequent DevSecOps software configuration review
Integration with workload management, monitoring, compliance, and vulnerability systems

capabilities.name: Application testing software
capabilities.description: Application testing software supports static and dynamic testing in CI/CD for all applications, performs comprehensive code analysis and manual testing, is reviewed frequently, and integrates with other platforms for contextual analysis.
evaluation_focus: Application testing software adoption
Static and dynamic testing features
Testing in CI/CD pipeline for all applications
Comprehensive code analysis and manual testing capability
Frequent testing software configuration review
Integration with other platforms for contextual analysis

capabilities.name: Proactive issue identification
capabilities.description: Application testing software proactively identifies issues in builds based on playbooks with automated fault discovery.
evaluation_focus: Proactive issue identification based on playbooks
Automated discovery of issues and faults

capabilities.name: Static Testing
capabilities.description: Static testing is performed for all new applications as part of CI/CD and can be automated.
evaluation_focus: Static testing for all new applications in CI/CD
Automated static testing

capabilities.name: Dynamic Testing
capabilities.description: Dynamic testing is performed for all new applications as part of CI/CD and can be automated.
evaluation_focus: Dynamic testing for all new applications in CI/CD
Automated dynamic testing

capabilities.name: Application development and testing user management. Removal of developer access from production network
capabilities.description: CI/CD pipelines manage user access to developer and production environments, developer accounts are removed from all applications after production deployment automatically, and code scanning detects dev account anomalies.
evaluation_focus: CI/CD pipelines manage user access to developer and production environments
Developer accounts removed from all applications after production deployment
Automated developer account removal
Code scanning detects dev account anomalies in production code

capabilities.name: Application development owners and business analysts
capabilities.description: Clear separation of duties exists for all application business owners and developers, and business analysts review and translate requirements accurately.
evaluation_focus: Separation of duties for all application business owners and developers
Formal business analysts for requirements review and translation

capabilities.name: Application Architect
capabilities.description: A formal DevSecOps Architect supports enterprise-wide applications.
evaluation_focus: Formal DevSecOps Architect for enterprise-wide applications

capabilities.name: Expert Analysis
capabilities.description: External experts formally review code for all or critical applications.
evaluation_focus: Formal external expert code review
External code review scope for all or critical applications

evaluation.resiliency_weight_policy: Ask stakeholder for per-capability weights when adding a new evaluation service. This service uses weight 1 for all capabilities.
evaluation.pillar_policy: Some services may have no Technology capabilities; in those cases, do not compute or report a Technology pillar score.
